name: Wild Thing
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Top round or sirloin steak - sliced into 1/8" slices
1 package Long grain and wild rice mix - (4.3 to 6.25 oz.) prepared according to package directions
7 oz Canned whole kernel corn - drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add oil.
2. Brown beef in the skillet, about 2-3 minutes per side, until fully cooked.
3. Add onions and cook for an additional minute.
4. Stir in rice, corn, and tomatoes.
5. Cook, stirring occasionally, until heated through thoroughly, about 2 to 3 minutes more.
